visual_description: A massive, muscular creature with horns looms over a stone platform, its body illuminated by dim torchlight. Smaller armored figures stand nearby, some brandishing weapons as the creature reaches out with a glowing green hand. The scene is chaotic, with the creature moving aggressively while the smaller figures react defensively.
